top_findings.summary: The skill is described as a dashboard generator for KPI visualization and monitoring, but it requests unrestricted Bash command execution (Bash(*)) alongside file system access (Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep) and network capabilities (WebFetch). This combination allows the skill to perform arbitrary system actions (e.g., installing software, modifying system files, accessing sensitive data) far beyond generating dashboard configurations or fetching data for visualization. The stated purpose does not justify such broad system-level control, especially when the skill appears focused on configuration generation and data processing, not system administration or unrestricted data collection.
